content.en:
Rumble!!!

Many supremes took action, tearing apart this node in the Origin Realm, and immediately invaded the Origin Realm.

Then, the Supremes cast secret techniques one by one, either through the bloodline, or through the law of cause and effect, to pass on some simple information, and among them was the Kunwu Supreme of the Human Race, because Ye Tian had also entered it, he had to inform Ye Tian.

......

Origin Realm.

Aurora was using some treasures to improve his war pet Nine Colored Sacred Cow, when he suddenly heard a message, which was transmitted from the depths of his soul.

"Origin Realm...... Node...... Millennium...... Hurry back!"

There is not much information, but the awareness is very clear.

"Is this ......" Aurora was stunned, and then suddenly realized, "It was summoned to me by the Supremes, it seems that the node where I came in was unstable? Or is it something? No matter what, I have to go back." I have harvested a lot of treasures, and I have also obtained the Nine Colored Divine Cow cubs, even if I haven't found the Well of Origin, but the harvest is enough to make the Supreme Envious, there is no need to continue to wander here!"

Thinking about it, Aurora rushed towards the node where he had come.

Another place.

Ye Tian also received the summons from the Kunwu Supreme, but the power of the Kunwu Supreme was limited, and even if the summons came, the information of the summons was very small.

"Quick Return ......"

Receiving such information, Ye Tian's expression changed.

"Supreme Communication, to be able to let Supreme Communication, it seems that you have to go back!"

Immediately, Ye Tian also began to return.

At the same time, many cosmic gods in the Origin Realm returned one after another, but of course, some cosmic gods were confused by greed and did not want to go back sooner, but continued to look for treasures in the Origin Realm.

--------

Outside, on the dominant-level battlefield.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu looked at the node in the Origin Realm, and frowned again: "Just now we used the supreme-level power to communicate, and it caused a change in the rules of the Origin Realm, this node can no longer be maintained for another 1,000 years, I'm afraid it will be transferred again in another 300 years!"

"300 years, this time is too short, if there are more cosmic gods who break through to the realm of domination, the time will be shortened even faster. Hmph, I knew that I shouldn't let so many cosmic gods enter in the first place, and I wasted the opportunity of the children of other eras!"

The Golden Light Supreme said coldly.

The meaning of his words was very clear, those cosmic gods of all races were too weak, what were they doing in there?

In his opinion, these people who forcibly broke through to the Domination Realm were all those weak cosmic gods of all races, and after entering, they couldn't even save their lives, so they broke through to the Domination Realm one after another.

On the side, those supremes of the ten thousand races were a little annoyed, but they didn't dare to refute, after all, they were weak, how could they dare to argue with a terrifying supreme like the golden light supreme.

Another half a month has passed!

The time of the node has been shortened again, and it can only last for 280 years!

It seems that there is still a lot of time, but who knows if the speed of this time reduction will increase, once the node changes, those children of the era will not be able to come out.

No matter how strong their strength was, they couldn't break the world barriers of the Origin Realm.

The Origin Realm is protected by the Origin Realm of the Universe, and even if the Origin of the Universe is suppressed, they should not want to enter the Origin Realm.

Besides, they still have their own plans and purposes, how can they go to the origin realm to adventure, if they are trapped, they will not be able to come out, they can only wait for the day of the great destruction of the universe!

Therefore, it is impossible for them to enter the Origin Realm, and they can only hope that those sons of the era can come out as soon as possible.

"Turn on the node again, someone should be waiting at the node!"

The main road of the Yuangu.

"Hmm!"

The Golden Light Supreme nodded, and then a hand tore through the node, forming a channel.

Wow!

Several people flew out from the other end of the node.

"I've seen all the Supremes!"

The men said respectfully.

One of them is the son of the era, and the others are the cosmic gods of all races, no, they should be called the masters.

At this time, many supreme beings stared at those masters with some annoyance, making these masters tremble all over, not understanding what was happening.

However, the Supremes didn't bother to bother with these masters, so they just snorted secretly and stopped paying attention.

Next, the Supremes tore the nodes every half a month to let those people in the Origin Realm come out.

this day.

The aurora came out, which relieved those supremes who valued the aurora.

It's just that the sons of other epochs are dead, but Aurora is the top son of the era, and it is even expected to reach the level of the lord of the ancient age in the future, if it dies, the loss will be too great.

......

"It's almost time!"

Ye Tian looked ahead and muttered.

Originally, he could have come here quickly, but there were some delays on the way, mainly because he found another elixir.

The level of this elixir is several levels higher than that of the Heavenly Pole Fruit, which caused hundreds of Source Emperors to fight, and finally there was a Yuan Ancestor who arrived, and when that Source Ancestor slaughtered that group of Source Emperors, he took the opportunity to take away the elixir and escaped smoothly, but he was also a little injured.

For the sake of safety, he hid for a few days before rushing over.

At this time, when he thought of that elixir, Ye Tian was very excited.

That elixir was called the Flower of the Immortal Lin, because the energy was too strong, Ye Tian calculated that he couldn't take it now, otherwise he would explode and die, but once he was promoted to the ultimate of domination, he should be able to take the Flower of the Immortal Lin, and even be able to transform his body again.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian landed and saw some cosmic gods and masters.

"I've seen the Lord of Ten Thousand Laws!"

"I've seen the Lord of Ten Thousand Laws!"

"I've seen the Lord of Ten Thousand Laws!"

When these cosmic gods and masters saw Ye Tian, they greeted him very politely.

But Ye Tian was a little confused, among the cosmic gods he entered at the beginning, there were only those sons of those epochs of the twelve cosmic eras, and there were no such people.

"It should be that after we entered the Origin Realm, the Supremes found the nodes of the Origin Realm in order to find those sons of the era, which allowed these cosmic gods to also enter the Origin Realm. "

Ye Tian guessed.

Ye Tian didn't talk about anything with these cosmic gods and masters, but closed his eyes and waited for the node to open.

A few days later.

Rumble!!!

The node was torn apart, creating a void passage.

Ye Tian and the others flew into the Void Passage one after another and returned to the outside world.

Domination of the battlefield.

Ye Tian saw many supremes, and also saw Kunwu supreme standing in an inconspicuous position in the distance.

Swish!

Ye Tian flew over.

Seeing that Ye Tian had come out, Kunwu Supreme breathed a sigh of relief and said, "Just come out!"

"Thank you Kungo Supreme!"

Ye Tian thanked.

If it weren't for Kunwu Supreme's reminder, he might have stayed in the Origin Realm for a long time, maybe he would have missed the opportunity to get out, and once the node was gone, it would be almost impossible for him to find a brand new node.

If it was so easy to find, those Origin Ancestors in the Origin Realm wouldn't be unable to come out.
